message:
beads: file 4 frankenterm beads (ft-bs0ec, ft-btls2, ft-odywh, ft-xxp05)

Tracker catch-up for four beads surfaced and/or closed during the recent
recorder + mux + robot-payload work. One stays in_progress (golden
contract), three are closed with evidence links.

## In progress
- ft-bs0ec (P2 feature, assignee pane8) — robot_types agent inventory
  golden contract. Golden test + contract.json landed in 97ec6350;
  bead remains open to track rolling future drift across robot_types.
  Created 2026-04-22T04:22:08Z.

## Closed
- ft-btls2 (P2 bug, assignee pane8) — recorder config validation must
  reject unimplemented frankensqlite backend. Resolved by 75e88e5e
  (fix(config): reject unimplemented recorder backend early). Closed
  2026-04-22T04:37:48Z with reason "fixed".

- ft-odywh (P2 feature) — mux local spawn offload regression coverage.
  Verified in f8e260d7 (test(mux): prove LocalDomain spawn offload stays
  non-blocking). Closed 2026-04-22T04:30:56Z with reason
  "Verified in f8e260d7".

- ft-xxp05 (P2 bug, assignee pane8) — recorder health_with_cx preserves
  backend kind on cancellation. Resolved by 12d25418 (fix(recorder):
  preserve cancelled health backend truth). Closed 2026-04-22T04:32:17Z
  with reason "done".

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
